search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com domain. Prioritized English guide pages over generic home pages. No public claims marked ready.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Core hero directory with faction filters, hero roster, levels, and equipment details; useful for hero identity and build cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, factions, levels, and equipment references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table hub with category tabs and per-level badge costs; useful for locating research names and cost progression.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories, unlock paths, and badge costs by level.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Entry-level guide covering early heroes, systems, and progression basics; useful for onboarding and linking to hero/research topics.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early-game progression and starter hero context.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search returned no matching results on the allowed domain. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages on www.last-z.wiki matched the query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to the approved domain, but no indexed pages were returned for the query. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: Empty search results from the allowed domain.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com and surfaced direct wiki pages relevant to research and event mechanics. Best lead is Full Preparedness for the event rotation; Laboratory is the strongest mechanics cross-check; Bookstore is a support lead. No off-domain results were used.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycles include an Age of Science theme for technology research and a Hero Initiative theme for hero upgrades and recruitment tickets.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero progression.

results.title: Bookstore
results.evidence_summary: Bonus building linked to increasing overall research speed, useful as a support page for research-related event prep.
results.primary_user_job: Understand buildings that help research faster.

results.title: Laboratory
results.evidence_summary: Core building for researching technologies; supports cross-checking research mechanics behind event tasks.
results.primary_user_job: Verify how technology research works in the base.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.packsify.com returned no discoverable results for the provided query. No leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching Packsify pages were indexed or discoverable for this query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to mmediamreza.com and surfaced multiple Last Z-specific guide pages suitable for discovery. Prioritized concrete mechanic pages over generic pages. No claim was marked ready.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide focused on Military Center function, unit cap, base power, unlock level, and refugee bonus assignment.
results.primary_user_job: Check military building role, cap growth, and power impact.
claims_to_verify: Military Center increases max troop cap.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Level-by-level Rider Camp upgrade table with training cap, speed, and power progression.
results.primary_user_job: Track rider camp upgrade costs and combat progression.
claims_to_verify: Rider Camp has level-by-level cost/cap/speed/power data.
Higher levels affect promotion and speed.

results.title: Smelting Plant Guide: Enhancement Alloy Production - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Resource-building guide covering Enhancement Alloy output, hourly production, and output cap behavior.
results.primary_user_job: Verify alloy production mechanics and resource output.
claims_to_verify: Production has a cap and needs collection.
